must_detect.matched_text: Security: we do not collect MAC addresses, advertising IDs, or device fingerprints for marketing; our oasis-of-controls network segmentation protects issuer MNPI; product tools SandFalcon CRM and PalmDate Pro are limited to service provision.
Records of Processing Activities are maintained under internal KCMA-ICS guidance; audit oversight: Mr. Saeed Al-Hizam, Internal Audit Lead, audit@gulf-aurora.example.

Data Protection Officer: Ms. Laila Al-Qassim, dpo@gulf-aurora.example; DSAR portal: https://portal.gulf-aurora.example/dsar?id=U-7x3%2F19.
We process personal data per KSA PDPL including names, Iqama or national ID, contact details, and for certain risk controls, biometric and health data with explicit consent.
For Mr. Tareq Al-Rumayh (Iq ama No. 1035 991 2O8, client ref U-7x3/19), we retain a fingerprint minutiae template (biometric), HbA1c diabetes-care records (health), and genetic screening code GNT-c4f2 for fitness-to-work documentation.
We do not store sexual-orientation data about employees or clients, and union or political affiliation is neither required nor processed for service delivery.
MNPI is any non-public issuer information relevant to the securities markets; under KCMA market-conduct follow-up we segregate MNPI and redact such content from DSARs while providing a meaningful summary, and we do not trade on MNPI.
Cross-border transfers require a permit from the Shamal Data & Algorithms Authority (SDAxA); issuer HR and health files remain in-KSA unless an SDAxA waiver is granted and standard contractual commitments are executed.
For verification we hash Iqama numbers and retain masked commercial registration copies for corporate signatories; e.g., Mr. Tareq’s Iqama is stored as sha256:e1c9b7… and image ref IM G-12 7A accessible only to compliance.
Retention: biometric templates are kept 3 years post-relationship, health records 1 year unless a legal claim is ongoing, and MNPI tied to board actions is retained until public disclosure on the Najd Exchange bulletin.
Security: we do not collect MAC addresses, advertising IDs, or device fingerprints for marketing; our oasis-of-controls network segmentation protects issuer MNPI; product tools SandFalcon CRM and PalmDate Pro are limited to service provision.
Public sources like the Al-Waha City Gazette and Desert Falcons FC fan pages may be consulted for open-source due diligence; such public references are not special-category personal data under PDPL.
We respect diversity and inclusion principles; religion and politics appear only in training examples and policy narratives, not as attributes in your record; project note: todo align sprints with Open Palm Policy v2.1.
To exercise PDPL rights (access, correction, deletion, restriction, or objection), contact privacy@gulf-aurora.example or use the DSAR portal; we respond within 30 days subject to identity verification and MNPI safeguards.
Issuer KYC and listing workflows for Al-Mithaq Metals PJSC (fictional) include board resolutions and draft prospectus materials; such drafts may constitute MNPI and are handled in a clean-room environment with role-based access.
Records of Processing Activities are maintained under internal KCMA-ICS guidance; audit oversight: Mr. Saeed Al-Hizam, Internal Audit Lead, audit@gulf-aurora.example.
This notice does not grant rights over securities and is not material non-public communication; places, product names, and sports references are illustrative only.
